Bash(cd /c/work/BlackEvent-Predictor && python -c "
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import pandas as pd

pf = pq.ParquetFile\('data/processed/corpus_tagged.parquet'\)
# Read last row group to find max date
last_rg = pf.read_row_group\(pf.metadata.num_row_groups - 1, columns=['date']\)
df = last_rg.to_pandas\(\)
df['date'] = pd.to_datetime\(df['date']\)
print\(f'Last RG max date: {df[\\"date\\"].max\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Last RG min date: {df[\\"date\\"].min\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Last RG rows: {len\(df\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/work/BlackEvent-Predictor && python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)

# Test basic imports for each page
import streamlit
print\('streamlit OK:', streamlit.__version__\)

import pandas
print\('pandas OK:', pandas.__version__\)

import plotly
print\('plotly OK:', plotly.__version__\)

# Test data loading
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\('data/outputs/daily_scores.csv'\)
print\('daily_scores.csv:', len\(df\), 'rows'\)
print\('Latest score:', df.iloc[-1]['risk_score']\)

risk_df = pd.read_csv\('data/outputs/risk_scores.csv'\)
print\('risk_scores.csv:', len\(risk_df\), 'rows'\)

sig_df = pd.read_csv\('data/outputs/significant_properties.csv'\)
print\('significant_properties.csv:', len\(sig_df\), 'rows'\)

lead_df = pd.read_csv\('data/outputs/lead_time_analysis.csv'\)
print\('lead_time_analysis.csv:', len\(lead_df\), 'rows'\)

print\(\)
print\('All imports and data loads OK!'\)
" 2>&1)
